PreToolUse.name: task-lock-enforcer
PreToolUse.description: Prevents concurrent editing of task files by multiple Claude sessions

PreToolUse.name: master-plan-reminder
PreToolUse.description: Reminds to update MASTER_PLAN.md when modifying tracked files

SessionStart.name: session-lock-awareness
SessionStart.description: Shows active task locks from other sessions at startup

SessionEnd.name: session-lock-release
SessionEnd.description: Releases task locks when session ends
